title: MerchantTrend
description: Merchant trend information, broken down by a specific frequency, for a  specific date range.

debitTotal.description: The sum of all debit transactions associated with the merchant.

creditTotal.description: The sum of all credit transactions associated with the merchant.

netTotal.description: Net spending calculated as (debitTotal - creditTotal) associated with  the merchant for the specific duration.

averageNetTotal.description: Average spending calculated as (netTotal)/(Number of Months)  associated with the merchant for the specific duration.

transactionCount.description: Total count of transactions for the specified date range.

details.description: Breakdown of income/spending based on a predefined frequency - typically, monthly.
